334 J0100B_PRN_PAIN_MDCTN_CD J0100B_PRN_PAIN_MDCTN_CD J0100B Pain management: PRN Pain Medication Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident has received PRN pain medication or was offered and declined in the past five days. -=Not assessed/no information
